title: Donald Newhouse cared deeply about Syracuse, local news and SU students (Editorial Board Opinion)
summary: Editorial tribute to Donald E. Newhouse (1929-2026), who significantly influenced Syracuse through media ownership (syracuse.com/The Post-Standard), major philanthropic commitments to Syracuse University's S.I. Newhouse School of Public Communications, and sustained investment in local journalism. The article highlights his legacy as a civic leader with deep institutional ties to both local media and higher education.

entity_refs.name: S.I. Newhouse School of Public Communications

political_signal.description: Memorial editorial emphasizes local news sustainability and higher education investment as civic priorities; reflects community values alignment with media/education institutional leadership.
